rag_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
References in AGREE contracts must resolve to visible AADL features or declared helpers
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: AGREE expressions must have valid types; unresolved references result in <error> type
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-specific ports directly
Package-qualified identifiers in AGREE must match configured AADL dependencies
Fix root reference issues rather than adding new architecture elements
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assume and guarantee statements are only valid in component types
Use only visible identifiers or declared helpers in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Placing assume/guarantee statements in component implementations instead of types
Referencing unresolved identifiers or non-existent ports in AGREE contracts
Adding package-qualified names not present in the model's configured dependencies
